content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

Implemented the pending `ralph-burning-9ni.3.3` remediations across milestone artifact handling and dual-root project storage. `src/contexts/milestone_record/bundle.rs` now infers legacy missing `explicit_id` metadata without treating every canonical bead as explicit, so rematerializing old `plan.json` files preserves progress when only non-shape fields change; `progress_shape_signature()` now uses the canonicalized explicit-id metadata directly. `src/contexts/milestone_record/service.rs` removes the unused sidecar-integrity computation so the shape check is explicit about deriving truth from persisted `plan.json`. `src/adapters/fs.rs` now rejects symlinks while seeding the live workspace, validates project IDs against the resolved canonical root instead of erroring on incomplete audit mirrors, hides staged deletes consistently by checking pending-delete state, and stages/commits/rolls back both live and audit project roots so dual-root deletion no longer leaves ghost projects visible. Added deterministic regression coverage for legacy `plan.json` compatibility, live-vs-audit listing, symlink rejection during live seeding, and updated project-store corruption tests to reflect the repaired dual-root semantics.

## Steps

1. [Completed] Inspect the reported filesystem and milestone-plan regressions to confirm the dual-root delete/listing failures, dead sidecar check, symlink copy exposure, and legacy `explicit_id` progress reset path.
2. [Completed] Patch milestone bundle/service logic to infer legacy explicit-id metadata correctly and remove the misleading unused sidecar validation path while keeping plan artifact rendering deterministic.
3. [Completed] Patch filesystem project storage to validate through the resolved canonical root, reject symlinks during live seeding, synchronize pending-delete handling across live and audit roots, update regression tests, and run focused validation.

## Validation Evidence

- Ran `cargo fmt --all`.
- Ran `cargo test project_store_ -- --nocapture` and all 18 project-store contract tests passed, including the delete/listing regressions.
- Ran `cargo test write_project_config_rejects_symlinks_while_seeding_live_workspace -- --nocapture` and the symlink-seeding regression test passed.
- Ran `cargo test progress_shape_signature_accepts_legacy_plan_json_without_explicit_id -- --nocapture` and the bundle compatibility regression test passed.
- Ran `cargo test materialize_bundle_ -- --nocapture` and all 13 targeted milestone materialization tests passed, including the new legacy `plan.json` progress-preservation case.
- Ran `cargo test milestone_bundle_contract_validates_and_renders_plan_markdown -- --nocapture` and the milestone bundle rendering contract test passed.

## Outstanding Risks

- Did not run the full repository test suite beyond the targeted project-store, milestone-materialization, bundle-shape, and contract regressions.
- The worktree already contained unrelated changes in `src/contexts/workspace_governance/mod.rs` and an untracked `.ralph-burning/` directory; those were left untouched.
